description_long: This is a sturdy outdoor bench featuring a seat and backrest made from several horizontal wooden slats with a rich brown finish. The frame and legs are constructed from metal, painted a dark green, and curve smoothly to form both the armrests and the support structure. The bench has four legs, each slightly angled outward for stability, and the armrests are integrated into the frame, arching over the sides. The backrest consists of three evenly spaced wooden slats, while the seat is composed of four wider slats. The overall design is utilitarian yet inviting, suitable for parks, sidewalks, or public gardens. The materials and construction suggest durability and resistance to outdoor elements.
description: A robust outdoor bench with brown wooden slats and a green metal frame, featuring integrated armrests and a supportive backrest.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the three horizontal wooden backrest slats and the green metal frame curving around the sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved green metal armrest and the arrangement of the wooden seat slats.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the full width of the seat and backrest, with all wooden slats and both armrests visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and leg structure seen in view 1.
attribute_leg_design: four straight metal legs with curved armrest supports
